Classroom simulation, not a real job platform

Experience the online writing scam before it costs real money.

A dynamic writer platform simulation with profiles, assignment pipelines, and admin-posted tasks. Educators can switch on guided red-flag notes with ?edu=true.

Operator dashboard preview

This frontend-only dashboard lets an educator add assignments and watch simulated activation revenue rise. Data is stored in the browser until the backend is wired in.

WritersHub Kenya is a controlled educational simulator. No real work or payments happen here.
